name: investorclaude
description: Claude Code plugin marketplace entry for InvestorClaw portfolio analysis and market intelligence.

metadata.description: InvestorClaude marketplace — Claude Code plugin for portfolio analysis (holdings, performance, bonds, analyst consensus, multi-factor synthesis). Backed by ic-engine + clio.

plugins.name: investorclaw
plugins.description: Multi-account portfolio analysis: holdings snapshots, performance metrics, bond analytics (YTM, duration, FRED-backed benchmarks), analyst consensus, news correlation, multi-factor synthesis, optimization, CSV/Excel reporting. Built-in financial-advice guardrails (educational output only).
